assertions.assertion: Recommends setting options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false in test configuration
assertions.rationale: Explicitly shows options.KeyManagement.Enabled = false with explanation about avoiding disk writes.

assertions.assertion: Recommends AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) to avoid disk writes
assertions.rationale: Shows .AddDeveloperSigningCredential(persistKey: false) with 'not persisted to disk' note.

assertions.assertion: Warns against hard-coding localhost ports — use factory.CreateClient() BaseAddress instead
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section showing wrong (hard-coded) vs correct (factory.CreateClient().BaseAddress) approach.

assertions.assertion: Mentions the risk of sharing HttpClient or ClaimsProvider state across parallel tests
assertions.rationale: Section 3 covers shared ClaimsProvider state, recommends ClearClaims() in InitializeAsync.
